text:
The web search confirms that the Llama 3.1 8B model does exist and is hosted at the exact URL cited (https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B). The model was developed by Meta and released on July 23, 2024. While Hugging Face hosts the model repository, Meta is the creator and copyright holder (as evidenced by the licensing text showing "Copyright © Meta Platforms, Inc."). The cited author "Meta" is correct as the creator/developer, even though Hugging Face is the hosting platform. This is consistent with how model citations typically work—the creator is cited as the author, not the hosting platform.

The "author mismatch" noted by the automated checker appears to be a false positive. The automated system may have incorrectly associated Hugging Face (the platform) as the author when it is merely the distributor. This is a case of non-academic real-world source (a model card/official model release), which is valid per the instructions.

EXPLANATION: The Llama 3.1 8B model exists at the cited URL, hosted on Hugging Face and developed by Meta, released July 23, 2024. The author attribution to "Meta" is correct as the model creator.
LINK: https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B
FOUND_TITLE: Llama 3.1 8B
FOUND_AUTHORS: Meta
FOUND_YEAR: 2024
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
